content.text:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to describe a target word for another player to guess.

Rules:
(a) You have to reply in the form: CLUE: <some text>. Guesses from the other player will start with GUESS.
(b) You cannot use the target word itself, parts or morphological variants of it in your description.
(c) In addition, the same rules apply for related words which are provided below.

End conditions:
(i) If you use the target word or a related word in your description, then you lose.
(ii) If the other player can guess the target word in 3 tries, you both win.

Let us start.

This is the target word that you need to describe and that the other player needs to guess:

notable

Related words are:

- important
- outstanding
- prominent

Important: You are under time pressure, give short descriptions that are to the point!

content.thinking:
I need to describe "notable" without using:
- notable (the target word)
- important
- outstanding
- prominent

I should think of synonyms or ways to describe what "notable" means:
- worthy of attention
- remarkable
- significant
- noteworthy
- distinguished
- famous
- memorable
- striking

Let me give a short, clear clue:

CLUE: Worthy of attention or deserving to be noticed; remarkable or significant

content.text: CLUE: Worthy of attention, remarkable, or deserving to be remembered

clem_player.response: CLUE: Worthy of attention, remarkable, or deserving to be remembered

content.text:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to guess a target word that another player describes to you.

You can make one guess at each trial. You win when you guess the target word. You lose when you cannot guess it in 3 tries.

After each trial you will get a new hint from the other player which starts with CLUE.

Make your guesses by just saying the word using the following form: GUESS: <a word>

Let us start.


CLUE: Worthy of attention, remarkable, or deserving to be remembered

content.thinking:
The clue describes something that is "worthy of attention, remarkable, or deserving to be remembered." Let me think of words that fit this description:

- Notable
- Noteworthy
- Memorable
- Remarkable
- Significant
- Important

The most direct match for "worthy of attention, remarkable, or deserving to be remembered" would be "notable" or "noteworthy." Given that this is the first clue and it's quite straightforward, I'll go with "notable" as it's a common word that encompasses all these qualities.
